inputs.label: Modulus (m)
inputs.businessContext: The modulus for arithmetic operations, must be a positive integer.

businessContext_i18n.en: The modulus for arithmetic operations, must be a positive integer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aritmetik işlemler için modül; pozitif tam sayı olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Modul für arithmetische Operationen, muss eine positive ganze Zahl sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le module pour les opérations arithmétiques, doit être un entier positif.
businessContext_i18n.es: El módulo para operaciones aritméticas, debe ser un entero positivo.

inputs.label: Number b
inputs.businessContext: Second operand, used in addition, subtraction, multiplication.

businessContext_i18n.en: Second operand, used in addition, subtraction, multiplication.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplama, çıkarma, çarpmada kullanılan ikinci işlenen.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zweiter Operand, verwendet bei Addition, Subtraktion, Multiplikation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Second opérande, utilisé pour l'addition, la soustraction, la multiplication.
businessContext_i18n.es: Segundo operando, usado en suma, resta, multiplicación.

inputs.label: Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Exponent for modular exponentiation (a^exponent mod m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponent for modular exponentiation (a^exponent mod m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Modüler üs alma için üs (a^üs mod m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Exponent für modulare Exponentiation (a^Exponent mod m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Exposant pour l'exponentiation modulaire (a^exposant mod m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Exponente para exponenciación modular (a^exponente mod m).
